title: Aizawl、Mizoram — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Aizawl、Mizoram的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Aizawl是Mizoram的一個城市，人口約400,000。The capital of Mizoram, a hill city in northeast India known for its high literacy rate, scenic landscapes, and vibrant tribal culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
